role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and remained silent in Phase 2.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation types, and road construction style.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Musa) and scrubland composition.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road markings, barriers, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain evidence and used image quality/camera height as a cue.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified the Philippines as the winner through a logical tournament process.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of concrete slabs, barriers, and scrubland match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of banana plants and tropical scrub is visually supported.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings and barrier styles are correctly described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Image quality assessment is consistent with the provided image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the ground truth (Philippines).
